=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/globalErrorInEffectCatch_preview.ts(5,24): warning TS377022: The `catch` callback in `Effect.tryPromise` returns the global `Error` type. Untagged errors merge together in the Effect error channel and lose type-level distinction; a tagged error preserves that distinction and can wrap the original error in a `cause` property. effect(globalErrorInEffectCatch)


==== /.src/globalErrorInEffectCatch_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics globalErrorInEffectCatch:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.tryPromise({
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377022: The `catch` callback in `Effect.tryPromise` returns the global `Error` type. Untagged errors merge together in the Effect error channel and lose type-level distinction; a tagged error preserves that distinction and can wrap the original error in a `cause` property. effect(globalErrorInEffectCatch)
      try: async () => 1,
      catch: (error) => new Error(String(error))
    })
